description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:7 Docker image and caches the node_modules/ directory. Define a deploy stage with a pages job that runs the before_script command npm install, then executes npm run build and cp -R site/public/.well-known public/ as its script, publishes the public/ folder as a pages artifact, and is limited to the master branch via only. The pipeline should deploy the built site to GitLab Pages.
